name: VITICULTURAL TOUR
body: Spend a fun the day learning about the winemaking process in Colchagua. As part of the program, you will visit 3 private vineyards and get to know the winemakers who have a long history in the area. They’ll share their secrets and techniques in harvesting grapes and walk you through the production process.
The vineyards are located in Patagua, Chépica, Apalta, Palmilla, Nancagua y Peralillo.
Includes:
A private visit to 1 vineyard in Colchagua
Spanish tour guide
Tasting of 2 wines
Not included:
Transportation
Duration: Approximately 1 hour
Tour Hours: This tour is available between 10:00 am and 6:00 pm daily
The Tourism Office is located at:
Av Diego Portales 957, Santa Cruz, O’Higgins

name: WINE TASTINGS
body: If you are interested in learning more about wine, we offer wine tastings at our wine shop. This lesson includes the 5 basic steps in tasting wine: color, swirl, smell, taste, and savor. During this process, we will also share the varietal character and ideal temperatures to serve the wine.
INCLUDES:
The tasting of 2 wines
A snack for pairing
Duration: Approximately 1 hour
Hours: Between 10:00 am and 6:00 pm daily
The Tourism Office is located at:
Av Diego Portales 957, Santa Cruz, O’Higgins

name: KAYAK RENTALS
body: We offer rental equipment for outdoor Kayaking and Stand Up Paddle-boards. It’s a fun and physical way to enjoy the outdoors while marveling at the scenery as you glide through the lakes.
INCLUDES:
Life Jacket
Kayaks and Table Sup are available between 10:00 am and  6:00 pm
The Tourism Office is located at:
Av Diego Portales 957, Santa Cruz, O’Higgins

name: BIKE RENTALS
body: As part of our service, we offer bike rentals so that you can explore Santa Cruz and its beautiful surroundings at your own pace. Depending on the type and level of activity you are looking for, we have mountain bikes and tandem bicycles. The bike costs vary based on a half or whole day rental.
We also provide helmets for each person.
Hours:
We are open between 10:00 am and 3:00 pm daily.
Payment is due at the time bikes are picked up.
The Tourism Office is located at:
Av Diego Portales 957, Santa Cruz, O’Higgins
